seoTitle: Smiths Gully vs Smoko — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Smiths Gully and Smoko. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Smiths Gully vs Smoko: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Smiths Gully and Smoko.
heading: Smiths Gully vs Smoko — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Smiths Gully, Victoria and Smoko, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Smiths Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Smoko (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Smiths Gully or Smoko safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Smiths Gully has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Smoko scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Smiths Gully scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Smoko scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Smiths Gully or Smoko?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Smiths Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
